date_text: Thu, May 7th • 12:00 PM AEST - Sun, May 10th • 10:00 PM AEST
description: Join us this Thursday as the legends from Dave n Dave’s Brewing roll into town with a bold and playful lineup that’s anything but ordinary. From crisp, hop-driven pales through to a decadent Black Forest pastry stout, the taps are loaded with flavour. And for those after something a little less beery? We’ve got you covered with their Hard Ginger Beer and Hard cherry cola!!! This event has the most Dad & Dave's Brewing limited releases OUTSIDE the brewery - EVER! Tap List: Banoffee Pie-PA (6.5%) Black Forest Gateau Pastry Stout (6.5%) OniBiri - Japanese Rice Lager w/ kombu seaweed (4.9%) Fraise - Strawberry Lager (5%) Myrtille - Blueberry Lager (5%) Dragonfruit Sour (4%) Mandarin Sour (4%) Belgian IPA (5.8%) Citra & Mosaic IPA (7.2%) Pilsner (4.2%) Crusher : Ginger Beer (4.5%) Crusher : Hard Cherry Cola (4.5%)
